text: Cesar performs a fully stapled anastomosis, having already stapled the common aneurotomy, using robotic surgical instruments.
The surgeon places stay sutures resembling atlas clamps to stabilize the common aneurotomy, preparing to staple it closed.
The surgeon uses three silk interrupted sutures to secure the anastomosis site.
The surgeon uses two stapler loads to close the common aneurotomy, ensuring the anastomosis is fully stapled.
